denial_letter_text:
NOTICE OF ADVERSE BENEFIT DETERMINATION

Date of Notice: 03/02/2026
Cigna Open Access Plus (employer-sponsored group health plan)
Member ID: W101251202          Group #: GRP-1158
Authorization / Reference #: UM-2026-125667
Claim #: CLM-2026-196375
Date of Service (requested): 02/10/2026
Treating provider (as submitted): Provider of record

Dear Member,

This document is notice of an adverse benefit determination. We received your provider's precertification / medical necessity review request on 02/12/2026 for the requested service
Diagnosis (as submitted): Not itemized in this notice
Denial code: CO-96 — Non-covered charge — service denied as not medically necessary under plan criteria.
Clinical policy applied: Coverage Policy 138 under Cigna Medical Coverage Policy and Milliman Care Guidelines (MCG)

EXPLANATION OF DECISION
Our review applied the criteria in the applicable coverage policy and your plan's Summary Plan Description (SPD), including utilization-management provisions. The information on file does not demonstrate that the requested service is medically necessary for this member at this time. The service is denied because plan criteria were not met. Specifically, the information provided does not satisfy utilization-management requirements for the benefit category under review. The record did not include sufficient detail to confirm that plan criteria were met.

Additional plan language regarding experimental/investigational definitions, network status, and member cost-sharing may apply and is available upon request.

YOUR RIGHT TO INFORMATION
You may request a copy of your claim file, including documents, clinical criteria, and other information we considered in making this determination. Submit your request to the address shown on this notice or through the member portal identified in your plan materials.

APPEAL RIGHTS
You have the right to appeal this determination. If this denial is upheld after internal review, you may have the right to request an independent external review of our decision at no cost to you, subject to applicable federal and state requirements. To file a standard appeal, send a written request and supporting medical records within 180 days of the date of this notice. Include your member identification number (W101251202) and reference UM-2026-125667. You may also have the right to receive, upon request and without charge, copies of documents relevant to this determination.

Please note that benefits are subject to all terms, exclusions, and limitations of your group health plan document. This letter constitutes the formal adverse determination for the service identified above.

Sincerely,

Cigna Health Care Management
Medical Review Unit
clinical_context: The 27-year-old member has Stable angina with positive stress test (I20.9). He has been treated under commercial coverage with Coronary CT angiography recommended as the next appropriate step. Typical angina class II; stress ECG with 2 mm ST depression at 7 METs. Submitted documentation supports medical necessity for Coronary CT angiography in the setting of Stable angina with positive stress test (I20.9); the denial letter does not discuss those records or cite the objective findings in the file.
